---
pagetitle: "Agentic Basics"
title: "[Agentic Basics]{.amber}"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#2C3E50"
  data-background-image: figs/banner.png
  data-background-size: 24%
  data-background-position: right 20% center
  class: dark-centered
  style: text-align:left;
---

## Meet Your Instructors {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/about.qmd >}}

## Today {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/roadmap.qmd >}}

## Assistants vs Agents {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/two-terms.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/agent-equation.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/practice-1.qmd >}}

## Where you launch matters {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/two-directories.qmd >}}

## Open your workspace {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/setup.qmd >}}

## Let's get started with a website {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/get-started.qmd >}}

## Your First HTML Page {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/first-prompt.qmd >}}

## Example Output: Single Page {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/html-result.qmd >}}

## Some More HTML Pages {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/second-prompt.qmd >}}

## Example Output: A Full Website {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/html-result-2.qmd >}}

## The Structure of a Website {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/website-structure.qmd >}}

## Know what you're building {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/know-the-basics.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/practice-2.qmd >}}

## The CLAUDE.md file {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/claude-md.qmd >}}

## Skills {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/skills.qmd >}}

## Installing skills {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/install-skills.qmd >}}

## Extend, don't restart {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/multipage-prompt.qmd >}}

## Where it struggles {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/pitfalls.qmd >}}

## &nbsp; {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/practice-3.qmd >}}

## Three takeaways {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/takeaways.qmd >}}

## The hardest skill {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/hardest-skill.qmd >}}

## Up next {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/up-next.qmd >}}
